topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: die genaue version, build etc soll auf der webpage irgendwo versteckt mit hover für mehr infos stehen, damit ich vor allem sehen kann ob auch wirklich die richtige version im betrieb ist
Backend health today returns status ok only — no git sha, release tag, or frontend build id; AppLayout sidebar footer has no version stamp
topic_coverage.delegation_scope: backend/src/health/mod.rs or GET /api/v1/meta/build-info; frontend AppLayout.tsx subtle footer/hover tooltip; Vite define import.meta.env.VITE_BUILD_ID at docker build; handoffs/releases/* tag alignment
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: Operator pain from BUG-0023 deploy: code released but live container stale — no in-app oracle. Extend existing /health or add lightweight meta endpoint; embed build stamp in SPA bundle at compile time.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Must not expose secrets or .env values in build metadata; Traefik/browser cache may serve old index.html after deploy — stale detection should compare SPA build id vs backend authoritative id
eventuell brauchen wir auch einen algo der prüft ob die im browser geladen version noch alt ist, eventuell via backend abgleich
Done when operator can confirm deployed release tag / build id / image time from the UI hover without docker inspect, and sees a non-blocking stale warning when browser bundle lags backend

decomposition.rationale: Deploy observability vertical slice — backend build metadata + subtle UI stamp + stale SPA detection; one operator-facing feature.
alternatives_considered: Settings page only — rejected (operator wants always-available hidden stamp)
Split backend meta vs frontend UI — rejected (no user value without both)
